summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned; low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled or blocked by the job. Each open PR is classified independently from the hydrated preflight artifact.
